logs.title: Group A Experiment — Phase 2
logs.desc: Observed organisational reactions to a restructured training session. Noted 3 anomalies worth following up.

logs.title: Launch: HSK3 Sprint Content
logs.desc: Posted 2 x 60-second TikTok videos. CTR up 18% vs last week. New users: +34.

logs.title: Speaking Practice — Daily Topics
logs.desc: Finished 3 topics. Recorded & compared with last week. Fluency improved on transitions.

logs.title: Post-Training Survey — Data Collect
logs.desc: N=28 participants. 89% response rate. Qualitative analysis still pending.

logs.title: Build: Thematic Vocabulary Pack
logs.desc: Completed first 5 topics. Tested with 3 beta learners. Positive feedback overall.

logs.title: IELTS Writing Task 2 — Error Review
logs.desc: Reviewed 2 essays. Main issues: weak cohesion & overused connectors. Added to checklist.

logs.title: Feb Data Analysis — Draft Report
logs.desc: Completed draft. Key finding: training effectiveness drops in week 3.

logs.title: Q1 Sales Strategy Review
logs.desc: Feb revenue up 22%. TikTok = 61% of traffic. Web conversion still needs work.

logs.title: Listening — BBC Sounds 30 min
logs.desc: Focused on British accent. Noted 12 new phrases. Comprehension ~75%.

logs.title: Design New Experiment — Week 4
logs.desc: Team brainstorm. Identified 2 key independent variables. Set fieldwork framework.

logs.title: Rest Day — End-of-week Metrics Scan
logs.desc: No production. Quick metrics review: retention, CTR, revenue totals.

logs.title: Vocabulary Review — Anki Session
logs.desc: 150 cards. Retention 83%. 18 cards reset to 1-day interval.
